← Recipes

Roasted Potato wedges

  • Cut into wedges, place in bowl with olive oil
  • Add some combination of: olive oil, parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, smoked paprika, garlic powder and onion powder
  • Baked at 400 for 30 minutes

Recipe from Steve Vinter.

Recipe from Steve Vinter.
